skills.name: 60-consult
skills.description: AI-Powered Requirements Discovery via intelligent conversation with parallel sub-agent analysis. Auto-chains into plan/prd then run.

skills.name: 60-plan
skills.description: Generate or edit execution plans from requirements and discovery

skills.name: 60-run
skills.description: Execute planned stories with quality gates and progress tracking. Defaults to --all mode with mandatory agent teams.

skills.name: 60-prd
skills.description: Generate a Product Requirements Document through guided questions, then auto-chain into plan and run

skills.name: 60-audit
skills.description: Full codebase and database audit — auto-detects stack, removes dead code/files, fixes errors, and ensures best practices with agent team and leader

skills.name: 60-hooks
skills.description: Configure automation hooks and safety rails for continuous execution
